message.content:
Explore the codebase at "C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test - Test Copie" VERY thoroughly. This is the complete version of a CitedBy.ai SaaS app.

I need:

1. What framework? (Vite+React, Next.js, etc.)
2. List ALL files in src/pages/ recursively
3. List ALL files in src/components/ recursively  
4. List ALL files in src/services/ recursively
5. List ALL files in src/types/ recursively
6. Read App.tsx to see all routes
7. Read the sidebar/navigation component to see all menu items
8. What features exist? Look for:
   - AEO monitoring / audit
   - Generative tools / outils génératifs
   - AI indexation / indexation IA
   - Score gratuit
   - White-label
   - EEAT Builder
   - API Developer Hub
   - Integrations GA4/Search Console
   - Retargeting
   - Scheduling/Planning
   - Dashboard
   - Analytics
   - Settings/Account

Be EXTREMELY thorough. List every single file.

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile the comprehensive report:

---

## COMPREHENSIVE CODEBASE EXPLORATION - CitedBy.ai SaaS App

### 1. FRAMEWORK
**Framework: Vite + React 18** (with TypeScript)
- Primary build tool: **Vite 7.3.1**
- Testing: Vitest + Testing Library
- Styling: Tailwind CSS (dark theme)
- Routing: React Router DOM (SPA in App.tsx)
- Build target: ES2020
- Note: Next.js is also installed (14.2.35) but NOT actively used for routing

---

### 2. ALL FILES IN `/pages/` (34 files - COMPLETE LIST)

```
1.  Account.tsx                  - User account, subscription management, billing, white-label settings
2.  ActionPlan.tsx               - Action plan recommendations
3.  Affiliation.tsx              - Affiliate program management
4.  AiCitationSimulator.tsx       - AI citation simulator (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini)
5.  AiMonitoring.tsx             - Monitor brand citations across AI engines
6.  AiResponseLayer.tsx           - AI Response Layer (Hub, Query Pages, Recommend JSON, Sitemap AI)
7.  AlertsAEO.tsx                - AEO monitoring alerts
8.  Analyze.tsx                  - New audit/analysis entry point
9.  AnswerFirstAudit.tsx          - Answer-First audit (6 criteria AEO scoring)
10. BlogOptimizer.tsx             - Blog architecture & AEO writing
11. BotTracking.tsx               - Bot tracking & crawler activation
12. Clients.tsx                   - Client database management
13. ContentWriter.tsx             - AI content writer (blog/article generation)
14. Dashboard.tsx                 - Main analytics dashboard (KPIs, projects, trends)
15. Directory.tsx                 - Indexed directory listing
16. DirectoryEntity.tsx           - Individual directory entry detail
17. EeatBuilder.tsx               - E-E-A-T Builder (Author Bio, About Page, Trust Signals, Credentials, Citation Blocks, Audit)
18. GenerativeTools.tsx           - Hub page for all generative AI tools
19. History.tsx                   - Analysis history viewer
20. Home.tsx                      - Landing/home page
21. LlmsTxtGenerator.tsx          - llms.txt file generator for AI guidance
22. Login.tsx                     - Authentication page
23. Messages.tsx                  - Messaging system
24. MissionOrders.tsx             - Mission orders management
25. Plan.tsx                      - Subscription plan page (standalone, not routed in App.tsx)
26. Projects.tsx                  - Monitoring AEO / Projects management (main project hub)
27. PublisherRequest.tsx          - Publisher request feature
28. Recharge.tsx                  - GTO Gas credit recharge (3 packs: Jerrican/Pompe/Citerne)
29. Reputation.tsx                - AI reputation management
30. Results.tsx                   - Detailed audit results report
31. RobotsTxt.tsx                 - robots.txt generator
32. SchemaOrg.tsx                 - Schema.org generator
33. SMCStudio.tsx                 - SMC (Semantic Map Creator) Studio
34. SourceOfTruth.tsx             - Source of Truth / LLM Truth generator (TXT/JSON formats)
```

---

### 3. ALL FILES IN `/components/` (7 files - COMPLETE LIST)

```
1. AICitationPreview.tsx      - Preview component for AI citations
2. CategoryCard.tsx            - Reusable category card component
3. GenerationModal.tsx         - Modal for content generation workflows
4. RecommendationCard.tsx      - Recommendation display card
5. ScoreRing.tsx               - Animated score ring visualization
6. SourceOfTruthModal.tsx      - Modal for Source of Truth editing
7. StripeCheckout.tsx          - Unified Stripe payment checkout (subscriptions + one-time purchases)
```

---

### 4. ALL FILES IN `/services/` (24 files + subdirectories - COMPLETE LIST)

#### Root Services (12 files):
```
1.  ai-citation-simulator.ts    - Simulate ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity/Gemini citations
2.  ai-monitoring.ts             - Monitor brand mentions on AI engines
3.  analyzer.ts                  - Core URL analysis engine (50 criteria, 6 categories)
4.  answer-first-audit.ts        - Answer-First audit scoring
5.  blog_prompt_db.ts            - Blog writing prompt database
6.  content_writer.ts            - AI content writing service
7.  criteria.ts                  - Criteria repository (50 AEO criteria)
8.  database.ts                  - Local analysis history database
9.  generator.ts                 - AI solution generation (Google Gemini or fallback)
10. llm_templates.ts             - LLM response templates
11. llms-txt-generator.ts        - llms.txt file generation
12. reputation_service.ts        - Reputation scoring service
```

#### EEAT Services (8 files in `/services/eeat/`):
```
1. about-page-generator.ts       - About page AI generation
2. author-bio-generator.ts       - Author bio generation
3. citation-block-generator.ts   - Citation block HTML generation
4. credentials-generator.ts      - Credentials/qualifications generation
5. eeat-auditor.ts               - E-E-A-T audit scoring engine
6. index.ts                      - EEAT module exports
7. prompts.ts                    - EEAT-specific AI prompts
8. trust-signals-generator.ts    - Trust signals generation
```

#### AI Response Layer Services (6 files in `/services/ai-response-layer/`):
```
1. hub-generator.ts              - Central hub generation
2. query-page-generator.ts       - Dynamic query pages generation
3. recommend-json-generator.ts   - Recommend.json generation
4. sitemap-ai-generator.ts       - AI-optimized sitemap generation
5. index.ts                      - Module exports
6. prompts.ts                    - AI Response Layer prompts
```

#### Additional Services:
```
- pdf_prompt.ts                  - PDF generation prompts
- robots_service.ts              - robots.txt generation
- schema_service.ts              - Schema.org generation
- smc.ts                         - SMC Studio service
```

---

### 5. ALL FILES IN `/types/` (3 files - COMPLETE LIST)

```
1. ai-monitoring.ts              - Types for AI monitoring module (MonitoringResult, AIEngine, etc.)
2. ai-response-layer.ts          - Types for AI Response Layer (HubOutput, QueryPageOutput, etc.)
3. eeat.ts                       - Types for EEAT Builder (AuthorProfile, TrustSignalsConfig, etc.)
```

Plus main `types.ts` in root with core types (User, Project, AnalysisResult, etc.)

---

### 6. ROUTING IN App.tsx (COMPLETE NAVIGATION MAP)

#### Lazy-Loaded Pages:
All pages are lazy-loaded with code-splitting for performance optimization.

#### Navigation Structure (from App.tsx):

**PRINCIPAL SECTION:**
- Home → `navigateTo('home')`
- New Audit (Analyze) → `navigateTo('analyze')`
- Dashboard → `navigateTo('dashboard')`
- Monitoring IA → `navigateTo('ai-monitoring')`
- Monitoring AEO (Projects) → `navigateTo('projects')`

**OUTILS SECTION:**
- Generative Tools → `navigateTo('generative-tools')`
  - SMC Studio → `navigateTo('smc-studio')`
  - Content Writer → `navigateTo('content-writer')`
  - Reputation → `navigateTo('reputation')`
  - Source of Truth → `navigateTo('source-of-truth')`
  - Schema.org → `navigateTo('schema-org')`
  - Robots.txt → `navigateTo('robots-txt')`
  - Bot Tracking → `navigateTo('bot-tracking')`
  - Blog Optimizer → `navigateTo('blog-optimizer')`
  - AI Response Layer → `navigateTo('ai-response-layer')`
  - llms.txt Generator → `navigateTo('llms-txt')`
  - Answer-First Audit → `navigateTo('answer-first-audit')`
  - AI Citation Simulator → `navigateTo('ai-citation-simulator')`
  - E-E-A-T Builder → `navigateTo('eeat-builder')`
- Indexed Directory → `navigateTo('directory')`

**GESTION SECTION:**
- GTO Gas (Credits/Recharge) → `navigateTo('recharge')`
- Affiliation → `navigateTo('affiliation')`
- Base Clients → `navigateTo('clients')`
- Mission Orders → `navigateTo('mission-orders')`
- Alerts AEO → `navigateTo('alerts')`
- Account & Plan → `navigateTo('account')`

**OTHER ROUTES:**
- Results → `navigateTo('results')`
- History → `navigateTo('history')`
- Publisher Request → `navigateTo('publisher-request')`
- Directory Entity → `navigateTo('directory-entity')`
- Login → `navigateTo('login')`

---

### 7. SIDEBAR/NAVIGATION COMPONENTS

The navigation is implemented directly in **App.tsx** (no separate Sidebar component file). Key structure:

- **NavItem Component** (defined in App.tsx, line 745) - reusable navigation item
- **Mobile Menu** - responsive sidebar on md:hidden breakpoint
- **Desktop Sidebar** - collapsible sidebar (toggle with isSidebarCollapsed state)
- **Breadcrumb Navigation** - context-aware breadcrumbs showing current page path

**Menu Items Hierarchy:**
```
const menuItems = [
  // Principal
  { nav.home, nav.newAudit, nav.dashboard, "Monitoring IA", nav.monitoringAEO }
  
  // Outils
  { nav.generativeTools, nav.indexedDirectory }
  
  // Gestion
  { nav.gtoGas, nav.affiliation, nav.baseClients, nav.missionOrders, nav.alertsAEO, nav.accountPlan }
]
```

---

### 8. COMPREHENSIVE FEATURE CHECKLIST

#### AEO/SEO MONITORING & AUDIT:
- ✅ **AEO Audit** (Analyze.tsx) - Complete website analysis
- ✅ **Monitoring AEO** (Projects.tsx) - Continuous project monitoring with KPIs, trend tracking
- ✅ **AlertsAEO** (AlertsAEO.tsx) - Visibility drop alerts and notifications
- ✅ **50 Criteria Repository** (services/criteria.ts) - Pre-built AEO checklist
- ✅ **6 Category Scoring** (High Impact, On-Page, Technical, Entity/E-E-A-T, Content, Trust)
- ✅ **Score Ring Visualization** (ScoreRing.tsx) - Visual score display
- ✅ **Recommendation System** (CategoryScore, Recommendation types)

#### GENERATIVE AI TOOLS:
- ✅ **Content Writer** (ContentWriter.tsx, content_writer.ts) - AI blog post & article generation
- ✅ **SMC Studio** (SMCStudio.tsx, smc.ts) - Semantic content mapping
- ✅ **Blog Optimizer** (BlogOptimizer.tsx) - Architecture & AEO-optimized blog writing
- ✅ **AI Solution Generator** (generator.ts) - Generates code/text solutions for each recommendation
- ✅ **Google Gemini Integration** (with fallback simulation if API unavailable)
- ✅ **Schema.org Generator** (SchemaOrg.tsx, schema_service.ts)
- ✅ **Robots.txt Generator** (RobotsTxt.tsx, robots_service.ts)
- ✅ **Reputation AI** (Reputation.tsx, reputation_service.ts)
- ✅ **Bot Tracking** (BotTracking.tsx) - Crawler activation & monitoring

#### AI RESPONSE LAYER / ANSWER ENGINE OPTIMIZATION:
- ✅ **Hub Generator** (AiResponseLayer.tsx, hub-generator.ts) - Central AI hub generation
- ✅ **Query Pages** (query-page-generator.ts) - Dynamic Q&A pages
- ✅ **Recommend JSON** (recommend-json-generator.ts) - Product recommendations for AI engines
- ✅ **Sitemap AI** (sitemap-ai-generator.ts) - AI-optimized XML sitemap

#### AI INDEXATION / AI CITATION MONITORING:
- ✅ **AI Monitoring** (AiMonitoring.tsx, ai-monitoring.ts) - Brand tracking across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini
- ✅ **Citation Simulator** (AiCitationSimulator.tsx, ai-citation-simulator.ts) - Simulate how different AI engines cite your content
- ✅ **Answer-First Audit** (AnswerFirstAudit.tsx, answer-first-audit.ts) - Citeability scoring (6 criteria)
- ✅ **Source of Truth** (SourceOfTruth.tsx) - LLM-friendly content (TXT/JSON formats)
- ✅ **llms.txt Generator** (LlmsTxtGenerator.tsx, llms-txt-generator.ts) - Brand guidance file for AI models

#### E-E-A-T BUILDER:
- ✅ **E-E-A-T Builder** (EeatBuilder.tsx, /services/eeat/) - Complete E-E-A-T toolkit:
  - Author Bio Generation (author-bio-generator.ts)
  - About Page Generation (about-page-generator.ts)
  - Trust Signals Generation (trust-signals-generator.ts)
  - Credentials & Qualifications (credentials-generator.ts)
  - Citation Blocks (citation-block-generator.ts)
  - E-E-A-T Audit (eeat-auditor.ts) - Full E-E-A-T scoring
  - Audit History & Comparison

#### SCORE SYSTEM / FREE SCORING:
- ✅ **Free Score** - Quick analysis available at entry
- ✅ **Global Score** (0-100) - Overall AEO/E-E-A-T score
- ✅ **Category Scores** - Breakdown by category
- ✅ **AI Citation Score** - Citation probability before/after
- ✅ **Detailed KPIs** (Dashboard) - Trend analysis, Share of Voice (for AI monitoring)

#### WHITE-LABEL:
- ✅ **White-Label Support** (Account.tsx) - Full white-label configuration:
  - Custom logo URL
  - Agency name branding
  - Primary & secondary color customization
  - Branded PDF generation (with jsPDF)
  - localStorage persistence

#### API DEVELOPER HUB:
- ⚠️ **Partial** - Account section mentions "API Key" display but full Developer Hub not fully detailed
  - Support for API integration for agencies & developers

#### GA4 & SEARCH CONSOLE INTEGRATIONS:
- ❌ **Not Implemented** - No GA4/Search Console integration visible in current codebase
  - Placeholder structure for future integration exists in services

#### RETARGETING:
- ❌ **Not Implemented** - No retargeting/pixel tracking features visible

#### SCHEDULING & PLANNING:
- ✅ **Partial** - Monitoring shows "Next Run" dates for audits
  - Full scheduling/calendar view not visible in current version
  - Mission Orders (MissionOrders.tsx) - Order management system

#### DASHBOARD:
- ✅ **Dashboard** (Dashboard.tsx) - Comprehensive analytics:
  - KPI cards (Score, Citation %, Projects, Alerts)
  - Project status table (URL, Score, Citation %, Date, Status)
  - Trend charts (Recharts library)
  - Recent activity

#### ANALYTICS & REPORTING:
- ✅ **Results/Report** (Results.tsx) - Detailed audit reports
- ✅ **Monitoring Trends** (Projects.tsx) - Multi-tab view (Monitoring, Report, Action Plan, Archives)
- ✅ **Action Plan** (ActionPlan.tsx) - Prioritized recommendations
- ✅ **PDF Export** - Generate branded PDFs with jsPDF
- ✅ **Chart Visualization** - Recharts for all analytics

#### ACCOUNT & SETTINGS:
- ✅ **Account Settings** (Account.tsx):
  - Profile management (email, name, etc.)
  - **Subscription Management** (Plan upgrade: Free → Pro → Enterprise)
  - **Billing History** (Invoice listing, PDF download)
  - White-Label customization
  - API Key display
- ✅ **Logout functionality**
- ✅ **Profile dropdown** in navbar

#### PAYMENTS & SUBSCRIPTIONS:
- ✅ **Stripe Integration** (StripeCheckout.tsx):
  - Subscription payment (monthly plans: 29€, 89€, 299€)
  - One-time gas pack purchases
  - Upgrade prorating calculation
  - Payment status tracking (recap → checkout → success)
- ✅ **GTO Gas Credits System** (Recharge.tsx):
  - 3 packs: Le Jerrican (50 Gas, 15€), La Pompe (200 Gas, 49€), La Citerne (1000 Gas, 199€)
  - +10-20% bonus credits on larger packs
  - TVA calculation (20%)
  - Invoice PDF generation

#### COLLABORATION & CLIENT MANAGEMENT:
- ✅ **Clients Database** (Clients.tsx) - Client management system
- ✅ **Messages** (Messages.tsx) - Internal messaging
- ✅ **Affiliation/Referral** (Affiliation.tsx) - Partner program
- ✅ **Mission Orders** (MissionOrders.tsx) - Project task management

#### DIRECTORY / MARKETPLACE:
- ✅ **Indexed Directory** (Directory.tsx, DirectoryEntity.tsx) - Public directory of analyzed sites
- ✅ **Publisher Requests** (PublisherRequest.tsx) - Publisher outreach feature

#### CREDITS & GAS SYSTEM:
- ✅ **GTO Gas** - Credit-based system for all AI operations
- ✅ **Credit Deduction** - Per-feature costs:
  - E-E-A-T Builder: 50 credits
  - Content Writer: 40 credits
  - AI Monitoring: 5 credits
  - AI Response Layer: 20-30 credits per generator
- ✅ **Low Credit Warnings** - Alert banner when credits < 10
- ✅ **Animated Credit Counter** - Smooth animation on credit changes

#### LANGUAGES & LOCALIZATION:
- ✅ **Internationalization** (i18n Context) - Multi-language support:
  - French (FR) ✅
  - English (EN) ✅
  - Spanish (ES) ✅
  - Language selector in navbar
  - Dynamic translation throughout UI

#### DESIGN & THEME:
- ✅ **Dark Theme** - Dark mode (bg-[#1a1d21], borders-white/5)
- ✅ **Purple/Violet Accents** - Gradient purple-500 → violet-600
- ✅ **Rounded Components** - rounded-2xl styling throughout
- ✅ **Tailwind CSS** - Full Tailwind styling
- ✅ **Custom Scrollbars** - custom-scrollbar class
- ✅ **Responsive Design** - Mobile/tablet/desktop breakpoints
- ✅ **Animations** - Fade-in, slide-in, skeleton loading shimmer effects

#### MISC FEATURES:
- ✅ **Command Palette** - Keyboard shortcut search (⌘K)
- ✅ **Toast Notifications** - Success/error/info notifications
- ✅ **Back-to-Top Button** - Scroll-to-top functionality
- ✅ **Progress Bar** - Scroll progress indicator
- ✅ **Session Timer** - Track user session duration
- ✅ **Auto-hide Navbar** - Navbar hides on scroll down
- ✅ **Quick Actions** - Dropdown quick actions menu
- ✅ **History/Archives** - Previous analysis archiving
- ✅ **User Plan Display** - Show current plan (Starter/Pro/Enterprise)

---

### 9. KEY TECHNICAL DETAILS

**AI Integration:**
- Primary: Google Gemini (@google/genai)
- Fallback: Deterministic simulation mode (when API key unavailable)
- Structured outputs with Zod schemas

**State Management:**
- React Context API (I18n, Toast notifications, Auth)
- Local state with useState
- History stored in localStorage-backed DB

**Build & Performance:**
- Code splitting with React lazy() + Suspense
- Skeleton shimmer loading states
- Chunk size warning limit: 500KB
- Target: ES2020

**Testing:**
- Vitest as test runner
- Testing Library for component testing
- jsdom environment
- Coverage reporting available

**Database:**
- Supabase for auth/users (configured but using mock auth in dev)
- Local IndexedDB-like storage via services/database.ts

**PDF Generation:**
- jsPDF library for invoice/report PDFs

**Charts:**
- Recharts for all visualizations (Area, Bar, Line charts)

**Icons:**
- Lucide React icons throughout
